name: Mutual NDA
description: Mutual non-disclosure agreement between two parties sharing confidential information.

name: BAA (Business Associate Agreement)
description: Business Associate Agreement under HIPAA between a covered entity and a business associate.

name: CSA (Cloud Service Agreement)
description: Cloud Service Agreement for procuring SaaS / cloud services between a provider and customer.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement between a vendor and an early-customer design partner that helps shape the product.

name: DPA (Data Processing Agreement)
description: Data Processing Agreement for GDPR / privacy compliance between a controller and a processor.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Partnership Agreement between two organizations collaborating on joint go-to-market activities.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Pilot Agreement for a short, paid proof-of-value engagement between a vendor and a prospect.

name: PSA (Professional Services Agreement)
description: Professional Services Agreement for consulting or implementation work alongside product purchases.

name: SLA (Service Level Agreement)
description: Service Level Agreement module defining uptime, support, and credits for an underlying agreement.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard software license agreement granting a customer the right to use vendor software.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard AI Addendum supplementing an underlying agreement with AI-specific terms.
